entry.name: historyLength
entry.label: Number of samples kept for the history graph.

entry.name: gpuId
entry.label: KSystemStats GPU device id (e.g. gpu0). "auto" selects the first available GPU.

entry.name: showLabel
entry.label: Show the percentage label on top of the panel graph.

entry.name: showTemperature
entry.label: Show GPU temperature in the popup.

entry.name: showVram
entry.label: Show VRAM usage in the popup.

entry.name: showPower
entry.label: Show GPU power draw in the popup.

entry.name: graphColor
entry.label: Custom graph color. Empty means the current theme highlight color.
